title: Mock Test 1 — Clinic Patient API
description:
### ⏱️ TIMED PRACTICE — 45 Minutes

This is a mock assessment. Try to complete it within 45 minutes.

### Your Task

Build a Patient Management API from scratch using all patterns.

### Requirements

- `Patient` entity: `id` (Long), `firstName` (String), `lastName` (String), `age` (Integer), `condition` (String), `doctor` (String)
- `PatientRequestDTO`: `firstName`, `lastName`, `age`, `condition`, `doctor`
- `PatientResponseDTO`: `id`, `fullName` (firstName + " " + lastName), `age`, `condition`, `doctor`
- `PatientRepository` with: `findByDoctor(String)`, `findByCondition(String)`
- `PatientService`, `PatientController` at `/api/patients`

### Endpoints

- `GET /api/patients` → all (200)
- `GET /api/patients/{id}` → by ID (200 or 404)
- `GET /api/patients/doctor/{doctor}` → by doctor (200)
- `GET /api/patients/condition/{condition}` → by condition (200)
- `POST /api/patients` → create (201)
- `PUT /api/patients/{id}` → update (200 or 404)
- `DELETE /api/patients/{id}` → delete (204 or 404)

### Remember

- Entity + Repository + Service + DTO + Custom Queries
- Computed field: fullName
- Start your timer NOW! ⏱️
hints: No hints for mock tests! You should know this by now 💪
